title: Senior Product Manager: subscription
full_text:
Introduction: Zomato Gold is our flagship loyalty program. As the Product Manager for Gold, you are the custodian of an economy involving millions of users and restaurant partners. This team sits at the core of Zomato’s growth engine, balancing consumer value with restaurant sustainability.

Roles & Responsibilities:
- Own the end-to-end P&L for Zomato Gold, optimizing for net-positive contribution margins.
- Identify behavioral triggers for subscription churn and deploy automated win-back journeys.
- Design 'Smart Discounting' frameworks that protect restaurant partner profitability.
- Lead a cross-functional team of engineers and designers to move the needle on Renewal Rates.
- Drive the roadmap for 'Dining Out' integrations, facilitating discovery-to-payment loops.
- Author granular Product Requirement Documents accounting for edge cases in payment settlements.
- Conduct regular qualitative interviews with users and restaurant partners.

Mandatory Requirements:
- 4+ years of core Product Management experience in a high-growth B2C internet firm.
- Bachelor of Technology from a Tier-1 institute (IIT/NIT/BITS).
- Expert-level SQL skills (complex cohort analysis and window functions).
- Proven track record of owning a product with 2M+ Monthly Active Users.

title: Staff Software Engineer
full_text:
Introduction: The Core Ordering & Payments Team at Zomato is responsible for the 'Critical Path.' Our systems must orchestrate inventory, payments, and GPS tracking within milliseconds, even during high-traffic surges.

Roles & Responsibilities:
- Lead the architectural evolution from monolithic legacy systems to event-driven microservices.
- Design and implement multi-region failover strategies ensuring 99.99% availability.
- Own the P99 latency of checkout services, keeping core API responses under 40ms.
- Implement distributed locking using Redis/Redlock to prevent race conditions in inventory.
- Drive the Architecture Review Board for API design and service-to-service communication.
- Mentoring Lead and Senior Software Engineers through rigorous code reviews.
- Build custom Prometheus/Grafana dashboards to monitor 'Silent Failures' in distributed systems.

Mandatory Requirements:
- 8+ years of professional backend engineering experience (3+ in Staff/Lead capacity).
- Expert-level mastery of Golang or Java.
- Proven experience designing systems handling >100,000 Requests Per Second.
- Deep expertise in PostgreSQL, Redis, and Kafka.

title: Senior Data Analyst: Logistics & Supply Chain
full_text:
Introduction: Zomato is, at its heart, a logistics company. You will solve the 'Traveling Salesman Problem' millions of times per day, optimizing movements for 300,000+ delivery partners.

Roles & Responsibilities:
- Identify 'Order Batching' opportunities to increase Orders Per Hour by 10%.
- Optimize 'Rain Surge' and 'Peak Hour' pricing models to balance real-time supply and demand.
- Build propensity models to identify delivery partners at risk of churn.
- Utilize geospatial indexing for 'Dark Store' and 'Cloud Kitchen' placement strategies.
- Lead the design of Switchback testing to evaluate new delivery fee structures.
- Build automated visualization layers in Tableau/Superset for City Managers.
- Develop 7-day rolling demand forecasts at the Area-level for fleet allocation.

Mandatory Requirements:
- 5+ years in high-impact Data Analytics (Logistics, Quick-Commerce, or Ride-sharing).
- Professional-level SQL and Python (Pandas, Scikit-learn, NumPy).
- Mastery of hypothesis testing and handling 'Network Effects' in experiments.
- Deep understanding of logistics KPIs like Click-to-Door and Delivery Partner Earnings.

title: Staff AI Product Manager: Personalization
full_text:
Introduction: Zomato is evolving into an AI-first Discovery platform. You will lead the team building the 'Brain' of Zomato—the models that decide what users see on their home screen.

Roles & Responsibilities:
- Lead the strategy for Multi-Task Learning ranking models balancing CTR and Margin.
- Spearhead the development of 'Zia' (AI Assistant) for search, recommendations, and support.
- Develop the 'User Taste Embedding' project to represent user palates in real-time.
- Design AI experiences like AI-generated menu summaries and dish-level recommendations.
- Define evaluation frameworks (LLM-as-a-judge) to ensure accurate, brand-safe AI outputs.
- Bridge the gap between PhD-level Machine Learning Researchers and User Experience Designers.
- Manage the ROI of AI features, balancing GPU costs against incremental Gross Merchandise Value.

Mandatory Requirements:
- 6+ years in Product Management, with 3+ years owning high-stakes Machine Learning products.
- Ability to discuss Transformer architectures, Vector Search, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation.
- Proven track record of 5%+ conversion lift through algorithmic interventions.
- Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science or a quantitative field.
